title: polypodium limbatum
intro: Polypodium limbatum, also known as Poly, is a type of fern plant native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as improving circulation, reducing blood pressure, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, including bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, Polypodium limbatum is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
